description: The file 'retrofit_project.skp' is open in SketchUp Make 2017. It contains a square hip-roof house with an existing solar array on the South face. Your task is to: 1) Model a 1.2m x 1.2m skylight on the South roof (approx 2 meters down from the ridge). 2) Delete any existing solar panels that intersect or conflict with this new skylight. 3) Use the Skelion plugin to place new solar panels on the empty West-facing roof to recover the lost capacity (ensure the final total panel count is >= the starting count). 4) Save the modified model as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\retrofit_complete.skp'.
